introSection: Fun in the Sun is a steel semi-spinning hamster wheel kiddie roller coaster located at The Funplex Myrtle Beach in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster opened with the park on May 21, 2021.

On September 15, 2024 the park finished its season, and on October 30, 2024, the park was announced to have permanently closed.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train. There are four regular spinning cars which seat two riders in two rows facing back-to-back. The front car is a "Hamster Wheel" car which seats two riders facing each-other. As the train moves, this car "rolls", inverting its riders multiple times.

fullText:
Fun in the Sun is a steel semi-spinning hamster wheel kiddie roller coaster located at The Funplex Myrtle Beach in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

The coaster opened with the park on May 21, 2021.

On September 15, 2024 the park finished its season, and on October 30, 2024, the park was announced to have permanently closed.



Single train. There are four regular spinning cars which seat two riders in two rows facing back-to-back. The front car is a "Hamster Wheel" car which seats two riders facing each-other. As the train moves, this car "rolls", inverting its riders multiple times.
